methods.description: Process for selecting hydrological stations and calculating monthly mean streamflow to analyze seasonal variations and their correlation with climatic factors.

steps.description: We selected two hydrological stations near the sampling sites in the study area: Huanyuankou station in the Yellow River.
steps.searchable_summary: select hydrological stations for data collection

steps.description: The monthly mean streamflow of each station was calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate monthly mean streamflow for each station

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze streamflow data and its correlation with climatic factors, including linear regression and cross-validation.

steps.description: In Pearson's correlation analysis, the streamflow data of Huanyuankou and Heishiguan along with the regional chronology were examined from January to December.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Pearson's correlation analysis on streamflow data

steps.description: Based on the results of the streamflow response, a linear regression equation was used to reconstruct the streamflow variation in the middle Yellow River.
steps.searchable_summary: use linear regression to reconstruct streamflow variation

steps.description: Statistical tests, including the reduction of error (RE), Pearson correlation coefficient (r) and coefficient of efficiency (CE), were computed using the method of leave-one-out cross-validation.
steps.searchable_summary: perform leave-one-out cross-validation for model validation

steps.description: To establish connections between our streamflow reconstruction and the atmospheric circulations in East Asia, we analyzed multiple correlations of our streamflow reconstruction with the EASM index and sea surface temperature dataset (HadSST2) for the common period.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze correlations between streamflow reconstruction and climatic indices
